setting_exit: NiX exits the cramped night kitchen and post-binge domestic cage through the service door, crosses a narrow alley into cold daylight, and keeps moving—transit platform, open industrial yard, rooftop edge—without looping back to the same sink-and-fridge room.
nix_remains_recognisable: NiX stays NiX because posture stays chosen not collapsed, objects carry aftermath not decoration, and daylight does not soften hierarchy or erase danger. She reads as agentic and dignified in every new frame—never a helpless victim, never a generic gothic travel poster.
frame_prompts: 9:16 vertical, harsh morning daylight on a concrete rooftop: NiX stands three steps from the parapet, spine straight, chin level, one hand gripping a crumpled pharmacy receipt; wind lifts cheap jacket fabric; she owns the highest point in frame—agency, dignity, hierarchy, danger intact; no fog, no victim slump.

Street exterior at a bus shelter after rain: NiX sits upright on the bench edge, not curled inward, phone screen dark against her thigh like sealed evidence; wet tile and scratched plexiglass reflect flat grey sky; passersby blur low in frame while she holds visual command—controlled, watchful, physically believable.

Open industrial yard, midday sun cutting hard shadows across rusted wire shelving and stacked plastic crates: NiX walks the center aisle at measured pace, empty paper bag crushed in one fist, fluorescent spill from a distant loading bay door catching metal edges; she moves with purpose, not escape panic—danger reads as contained force.

Transit platform under a stripped fluorescent canopy: NiX waits two feet behind the yellow safety line, ticket held between two fingers like a small verdict, train wind tugging hair back; tiled floor shows scuff history; camera at chest height keeps her dominant in frame hierarchy while the arriving car threatens motion she does not flinch from.

video_concepts.title: Door to Platform
video_concepts.arc: Hand pushes domestic service door shut on stained tile and fridge-white glare; hard cut to alley daylight; match-cut footsteps from wet pavement to transit platform tile; NiX stops on the safety line, lifts ticket, holds eye-line forward as train wind hits—exit proven, kitchen loop broken.
video_concepts.camera: Stable handheld with one motivated push-in on the ticket; no fake shake; single strong light source per beat (door spill, street sun, platform fluorescent).
video_concepts.object_carrier: Crumpled pharmacy receipt becomes transit ticket—same paper evidence, new jurisdiction.
video_concepts.reject: No generic gothic styling, no decorative fog, no helpless victim framing or pity-closeups.
